link_rule: Application links must be copied only from job.url. Never construct, repair, shorten, or guess basf.jobs links.
llm_instruction: Use this intent-specific file when the user's request matches one of the aliases or keywords. Default to India first unless the user names another country or asks for other APAC countries. For details, fetch detail_path only for shortlisted roles.
